title: Support - Verify that data is correct after moving from Account linked to Tenant to Account not linked to any Tenant
scenario: Verify data correctness when switching from a Tenant-linked account to a non-Tenant account, ensuring Tenant info is absent.
steps: Log in with Account linked to Tenant A.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Verify Tenant A info is present.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account.
Log in with an account not linked to any Tenant.
Go to Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Verify Tenant name and Tenant ID are not present on the card.
expected: After moving from an Account linked to a Tenant to an Account not linked to any Tenant, the Support > App page should show Account information but no Tenant name or Tenant ID on the card.
